title: [WIP] Draft submission — pending 3-seed H100 verification
author: sscswapnil
body:
Draft — not ready for review. Opened to provide a public link for the Parameter Golf compute-grant application.

  Working branch: https://github.com/sscswapnil/parameter-golf/tree/v2-submission-apr23

  Current artifact: 15.99 MB, trains under the 10-minute cap. Will move out of draft after 3-seed p<0.01 verification on
   8×H100 SXM.
